title: HR Manager — Talent Acquisition & Workforce Planning (Contract)
description_raw:
TalentBridge Consulting are seeking an HR Manager on a 6-month contract to lead talent acquisition and workforce planning activities for a large UK manufacturing client. Engaged inside IR35 via umbrella.

Responsibilities:
- Lead recruitment campaigns for engineering and operations staff
- Manage relationships with recruitment consultants and staffing agencies
- Oversee onboarding process for new starters
- Implement talent management and succession planning frameworks
- Report headcount metrics to the HR Director and board

Profile:
- CIPD Level 5 or above
- 5+ years HR management experience
- Manufacturing sector background preferred but not essential

Rate: £350/day inside IR35
Duration: 6 months
Start: ASAP
